content:
Tier: Mid-career to Established Writer/Dramaturgist

- Development fee (conceptual work + iteration): $8,000–$12,000
- Performance fee (premiere + participation): $1,000–$2,000
- Documentation / handbook co-authorship: $1,000–$2,000 (or equity share in future publications)
- Total typical commission: $10,000–$16,000

My Proposal (Once Funding Lands):

Given your role as “narrative co-architect” (not just commissioned artist, but foundational intellectual partner):

- Development fee: $12,000 (top end of mid-career range, reflecting your published status and dramaturgical sophistication)
- Performance fee: $2,000 (premiere + documentation participation)
- Co-author credit on handbook: $2,000 (or 50% royalty on future publication sales; your choice)
- Credit as Narrative Architect: Professional acknowledgment on all system documentation, GitHub repos, publications, and future grant applications
- Retroactive adjustment: If we land grants larger than $50K, we increase your fee proportionally. (Example: If Ars Electronica funds us, we add $3,000–$5,000 to acknowledge the expanded scope.)
